summary: Single-key relayer compromise let attacker mint unbacked GENS tokens on Polygon while burning none on BSC, breaking the 1:1 bridge invariant.
attack_trace: Steal sole bridge relayer private key
Submit forged Bridge_Withdraw events to Polygon
Mint $6M GENS tokens with no BSC backing
root_cause: EvoDeFi bridge used a single-signature relayer instead of multi-sig, single point of failure.
